name: Connect a Payment Gateway
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Connecting a payment gateway allows your customers to securely pay for their orders on your storefront. Commerce Cloud supports trusted payment providers that handle transactions, security, and payment processing, so you can focus on selling without worrying about technical setup."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The payment gateway acts as a secure intermediary between your customer's bank (or card) and your merchant account. It encrypts sensitive financial data (like credit card numbers) and handles the transfer, ensuring your store remains "},{"text":"PCI DSS compliant","bold":true},{"text":". "}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Since the provider handles the data, you avoid storing vulnerable information, significantly reducing your security risk and liability."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Before You Begin"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Make sure you have the following ready:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Administrator or settings access to Commerce Cloud"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"An active sales channel (website)"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"An account with the payment provider you want to connect (for example, Stripe or PayPal)"}]}]}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": Payment gateways are connected per sales channel. If you manage multiple websites, you’ll need to configure payments for each one separately."}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Access Payment Settings"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"From the "},{"text":"Commerce Cloud Dashboard","bold":true},{"text":", click "},{"text":"Sales Channel","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"You’ll see a list of all available sales channels."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Click the storefront where you want to connect the payment gateway"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"For example: "},{"text":"Furniture and manage customer tokens). "}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Once authorization is complete,Stripe will redirect you back to your Commerce Cloud dashboard"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once completed, Stripe will be successfully connected to your website. You’ll see the status update to confirm the connection."}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/acba8dd6-c6e2-45fa-a2db-0b1eac906a91/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-5911773232&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YksE5E-csCYpUxcLdYD9xfQCKJlz-TaWuiIn9XFUd3o&width=760","embedData":{"url":"https://media-cdn.atlassian.com/file/acba8dd6-c6e2-45fa-a2db-0b1eac906a91/image/cdn?allowAnimated=true&client=fc9ca6db-a9f5-4c39-bcc8-4f59a7959bcb&collection=contentId-5911773232&height=125&max-age=2592000&mode=full-fit&source=mediaCard&token=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..YksE5E-csCYpUxcLdYD9xfQCKJlz-TaWuiIn9XFUd3o&width=760","name":"","embedType":"image","float":"none","fileid":"acba8dd6-c6e2-45fa-a2db-0b1eac906a91","filecollection":"contentId-5911773232","resizemode":"stretchy-fit","source":"ssr-server","ssrPlaceholderIgnored":""}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Payment Methods in Stripe"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Once Stripe is connected to your store, you’ll see a list of "},{"text":"payment methods available through your Stripe account","bold":true},{"text":". These payment methods determine "},{"text":"how customers can pay during checkout","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Each payment method is managed by Stripe but controlled and surfaced inside Commerce Cloud for your storefront."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Stripe Card Payments"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Stripe Card Payment","bold":true},{"text":" allows customers to pay using standard credit and debit cards, such as:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Visa"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Mastercard"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"American Express"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"This is the most commonly used payment option and is enabled by default when you connect Stripe."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) Options (Klarna, Afterpay)"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Stripe also supports "},{"text":"Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL)","bold":true},{"text":" payment options, such as:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Klarna","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Afterpay","bold":true}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"These options allow customers to:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Split payments into installments"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Pay over time instead of upfront"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Increase purchase confidence for higher-value orders"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"From a merchant perspective, "},{"text":"you still receive the full payment upfront","bold":true},{"text":", while the BNPL provider handles installment collection with the customer."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"
How BNPL Payment Types Work in Commerce Cloud"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"These payment methods appear automatically "},{"text":"only if they are enabled in your Stripe account","bold":true}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Commerce Cloud does not require additional setup beyond Stripe"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Availability depends on:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Customer location"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Order value"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Stripe eligibility rules"}]}]}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If eligible, the BNPL option appears at checkout automatically."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"
Payment Method Status"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Each payment method has a "},{"text":"status indicator","bold":true},{"text":":"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Active","bold":true},{"text":" – The payment method is enabled and available to customers"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Inactive","bold":true},{"text":" – The payment method is connected but currently unavailable"}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"You can edit or manage individual payment methods using the "},{"text":"Edit (✏️) icon","bold":true},{"text":", which redirects you to Stripe for configuration."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Configuring Klarna or Afterpay in Commerce Cloud"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"When you click "},{"text":"Edit","bold":true},{"text":" on Klarna or Afterpay, you’ll see configuration options that control "},{"text":"when and how","bold":true},{"text":" these payment methods are offered."}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Configuration Fields Explained"}]},{"type":"h4","children":[{"text":"Surcharge (%)"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Adds an extra percentage fee when this payment method is used."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Useful if BNPL fees are higher and you want to offset the cost."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Example:","bold":true},{"text":"
A 2% surcharge on a $500 Klarna order adds $10 to the total."}]},{"type":"callout","children":[{"type":"callout-item","children":[{"bold":true,"text":"Note"},{"text":": Some regions restrict surcharges. Always verify local regulations before enabling. "}]}],"appearance":"info"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Connecting
